title: Absolute Terror damages opponent primary when opponent draws

plan.providerWarning: No WARD_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY found. The app will use local fallback plans until a server key is configured.

card.rawText: Equip to opponent's creature. Every time your opponent draws a card, inflict 10 damage to their primary creature.

plan.title: Absolute Terror damages opponent primary when opponent draws
plan.summary: Equip Absolute Terror to an opponent creature, advance to the opponent draw trigger, and verify their primary creature takes 10 damage.

notes: Pre-place Absolute Terror as field magic after equipping it to player_2 primary creature.
When player_2 draws a card, Absolute Terror inflicts 10 damage to player_2 primary creature.

steps: Equip Absolute Terror to player_2 primary creature.

expectedAssertions.label: Opponent primary takes 10 damage from draw trigger

manualVerification: The equip target is the opponent creature; the damage target is the opponent current primary creature.
riskNotes: Opponent-target equip and draw-trigger routing are both part of this check.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_007_absolute_terror-007-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
